ops.title: Auto-push refs/cc-notes/*: design decisions (2026-07-12)
ops.body:
Shipped in the commit tagged v0.23.0 (383f7f0e) + capt-hook v9.2.0.

- Turn-level auto-sync widened: jj commit/describe, ccx vcs ship, git/jj push, jj git fetch, and every cc-notes CLI/MCP write; once-per-turn token unchanged. Structured argv-prefix matching (capt-hook Runs/CommandFamily), never regex; --dry-run/-n/--help forms excluded.
- SessionEnd backstop: async handler, zero-network dirty check (refs/cc-notes/* vs refs/cc-notes-sync/origin/*), silent best-effort. Requires capt-hook >= 9.2 (its plugin hooks.json dispatches `run SessionEnd --async`; 9.0.0 deliberately dispatched only the session reviewer there).
- Distribution model (user-decided): cc-notes stays a REGULAR packs.toml pack installed by cc-notes init — no cc-notes plugin hooks.json, no session-attach. SessionEnd dispatch ships upstream in capt-hook. ensure-cc-notes.sh and the plugin.json hooks block are deleted; bootstrap lives in pack handlers (SessionStart ones registered async_=True because capt-hook only dispatches `run SessionStart --async`; sync SessionStart wiring would race the once-guard, whose claim key now includes the async variant — fixed in 9.2.0).
- init/hooks install run `uvx capt-hook skills install` + `pack add`, independently best-effort (errors.Join).
- Known limitations (documented in plugin/hooks/README.md): origin-only tracking comparison (backlog task 32404bb), tip-equality blind to LFS attachment content, remote-ahead reads clean (push-moment semantics), literal argv-prefix matching (env-wrapped commands miss).
